outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility expected - positive GEX environment suppresses moves. Spot near gamma flip creates directional uncertainty but dealer hedging will dampen volatility.
outlook.summary: Market is in a positive gamma regime with dealers long gamma, suppressing volatility. Spot (608.07) is oscillating near the gamma flip zone (608.5), creating a decision point. Major structural support at 600 across WEEKLY_1, WEEKLY_2, and MONTHLY_1 expiries forms a strong foundation. Max Pain at 602-606 suggests magnetic pull slightly below current levels. Call resistance is distributed between 610-620 with no single dominant wall. The confluence of Gamma Flip, Max Pain, and structural support suggests range-bound behavior with slight downward drift toward 605 area.

levels.motivazione: Critical gamma equilibrium in 0DTE and WEEKLY_2. Spot at 608.07 is testing this level. Positive total GEX (0.03B+0.26B) means dealers will hedge against moves, pinning price here.
Massive put OI across 3 expiries: WEEKLY_1 (46,413), MONTHLY_1 (102,185), MONTHLY_2 (29,802). Total GEX positive means dealers will defend this level aggressively.
Max Pain across WEEKLY_2 (606) and MONTHLY_1 (605). Only 0.5% below spot - strong magnetic attraction for options expiration targeting.
Highest call OI in 0DTE (10,324) with elevated volume (22,358). Secondary concentration at 615 across WEEKLY_1 and MONTHLY_1 creates resistance zone.
Significant call OI in WEEKLY_1 (12,795 calls + 14,032 puts) and MONTHLY_1 (27,922 calls). Major structural resistance for swing timeframe.
Secondary put support with strong OI in WEEKLY_1 (55,566) and MONTHLY_1 (35,352). Deep support if 600 fails.
WEEKLY_1 Gamma Flip (610.5) near high call OI (8,453). Mixed put/call activity creates choppy price action and dealer hedging friction.
Elevated call OI in WEEKLY_1 (8,158), WEEKLY_2 (17,613), and MONTHLY_1 (36,773). Upper boundary resistance for swing moves.
0DTE put OI (6,393) with MONTHLY_1 massive put concentration (107,122). Intermediate support between spot and 600 wall.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed - positive GEX regime with spot at gamma equilibrium
outlook.summary: Spot pinned at gamma flip zone (24995) with strong positive GEX (~38.6B). Max Pain at 24990-25000 acts as price magnet. Dealers long gamma will suppress volatility and pin price near current levels. Upside limited by 25075-25200 resistance cluster.

levels.motivazione: Critical gamma equilibrium across 0DTE+WEEKLY_1+WEEKLY_2. Spot at 24992.6 sitting exactly at this inflection point. Positive GEX regime stabilizes price here.
Multi-expiry Max Pain convergence (0DTE: 24990, WEEKLY_1: 25000, WEEKLY_2: 24950, MONTHLY_1: 24900). Strong attraction zone for MM pinning.
RESONANCE across 4 expiries (0DTE: 211, WEEKLY_2: 301, MONTHLY_2: 1502 OI). Massive structural support. Dealers defend aggressively.
Dominant MONTHLY_1 Call OI (4036 contracts). Immediate upside resistance. Only 82.4 pts above spot - primary ceiling.
RESONANCE across 4 expiries (0DTE: 59, WEEKLY_1: 95, WEEKLY_2: 298, MONTHLY_1: 798 OI). Major structural resistance.
RESONANCE across 4 expiries (0DTE: 335, WEEKLY_1: 55, MONTHLY_1: 240, MONTHLY_2: 65 OI). Secondary resistance cluster.
RESONANCE across 4 expiries (WEEKLY_1: 119, WEEKLY_2: 290, MONTHLY_1: 148, MONTHLY_2: 1034 OI). Strong upper boundary.
RESONANCE across 3 expiries (0DTE: 110, WEEKLY_2: 294, MONTHLY_1: 284 OI). Secondary structural support.
CONFLUENCE between WEEKLY_1 (72 OI) and MONTHLY_1 (566 OI). Mid-range support if pullback occurs.
RESONANCE across 3 expiries (WEEKLY_1: 79, WEEKLY_2: 27, MONTHLY_1: 720 OI). Psychological level aligned with Max Pain zone.
